headlines.h: Weather Alert: me ignoring every single red flag in a relationship because there's a pet involved
headlines.b: Residents advised to secure fragile objects and prepare for hallway drag races.

headlines.h: BREAKING: “Is something wrong with this plant?”
headlines.b: Officials confirm this is being treated as a "meow-jor" development. (Filed: 2026-05-28)

headlines.h: Science Desk Investigates: My cat looking at me while I'm dancing
headlines.b: The peer review process consisted of one stare, two slow blinks, and a decisive nap.

headlines.h: Exclusive: Government Announces New Standard: “Cat is pspspspsps immune"
headlines.b: Applies to boxes, laundry baskets, and your freshly folded clothes (especially those).
